DP.066.0000:
Listen, listen. Do you have a Pokémon
called MACHOP?\f
Would you be willing to trade your
MACHOP for my ABRA?
DP.066.0001:
Be nice to my ABRA!\f
I’ll be sure to look after your
MACHOP in return!
DP.066.0002: What I asked for was a MACHOP...
DP.066.0003:
Oh, OK...
Well, I can’t make you trade me.\f
But if you change your mind,
I’ll be right here waiting!
DP.066.0004:
Thanks to Pokémon, I got to be
friends with you!
DP.066.0005:
A Pokémon obtained in a trade
grows quickly.\f
But if a Pokémon grows too much,
it will often ignore the Trainer.\f
Of course, it won’t matter if you
have lots of Gym Badges.
